svg.title: Dual-track self-learning loop driving GR00T fine-tuning
svg.desc: A runtime episode (Claude plan, GR00T act, SimXArmAPI, sim or real arm) feeds an outcome evaluation. The outcome signal splits into two tracks: a planner track that writes distilled lessons to lessons.md and re-injects them into Claude's prompt, and a policy track that filters successful episodes and DAgger corrections into a GR00T LoRA fine-tune, producing a new checkpoint that is hot-swapped into GR00T.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the LLMBrain planning step use lessons.md?')
sendPrompt('Where does the GR00T inference call slot into _dispatch?')
sendPrompt('What does SimXArmAPI do with the action?')
sendPrompt('How does hardware/real_arm.py switch between sim and real?')
sendPrompt('How does the loop detect success vs failure for an episode?')
sendPrompt('What kind of lessons get written to lessons.md?')
sendPrompt('How should the filter pick episodes and capture DAgger corrections?')
sendPrompt('What triggers the GR00T LoRA fine-tune and how big should the buffer be?')
sendPrompt('How does the eval probe gate promotion of a new checkpoint?')
